S.FORM: = Didier Burkhalter = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 4 jiyax 17 ka Didier Burkhalter ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Switzerland ta sayang o kiya ka Didier Burkhalter, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 1 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = didiəɾ buɾkħaltəɾ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka didiəɾ buɾkħaltəɾ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan swit*əɾland ta sajaŋ o kija ka didiəɾ buɾkħaltəɾ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
S.FORM: = Didier Burkhalter = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 4 jiyax 17 ka Didier Burkhalter ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Switzerland ta sayang o kiya ka Didier Burkhalter, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 1 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
